system.description:
Level 3. Reaction (When an ally within Reach 6 Defends): you may spend 1 mana to cast an elemental ward on them:

  • Flame Ward. The attacker first suffers KEY damage (ignoring armor) and gains Smoldering.
  • Frost Ward. Grant 2×KEY Temp HP for this round. (These melt away if unused at the beginning of their next turn.)
  • Lightning Ward. Attacks miss them on 2 or less and they gain +KEY speed on this round.

Level 7. Your Elemental Ward spells gain +KEY effectiveness.

Level 11 (Empowered Ward). Your Elemental Wards gain +WIL Reach and +INT effectiveness.
